channel.title: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity
channel.description:
I am excited to share the about the new Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme :rainbow: that I and @smit.soni22 developed recently :partying_face: We used Mars as a starter theme which gave us a kickstart. It made it very simple for us to customize the theme. We also added pagination. Here are some quick links for the theme:
[Intro/Tutorial Video ](https://youtu.be/i1LaEDv0PNk) [Live Demo](https://twentynineteen.frontity.org/) [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@frontity/twentynineteen-theme): [Git repo](https://github.com/imranhsayed/frontity-twentynineteen)
I would like to thank @luisherranz, @Pablo, @SantosGuillamot and the entire Frontity team for their support from the time of development till release :clap:
Special thanks to @Reyes for writing a beautiful [blog](https://blog.frontity.org/introducing-twenty-nineteen-frontity-theme/) for the theme :slightly_smiling_face:

item.title: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity
item.dc:creator: imranhsayed
item.description:
Your welcome @Pablo.
Thank you for giving us the opportunity to contribute.
Like @smit.soni22 said we have plans to build more helpful packages. And we are already spreading the word

Read full topic
item.source: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity

item.title: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity
item.dc:creator: smit.soni22
item.description:
Thanks a lot for your appreciation & support. We are also planing some more use-full extension for the frontity framework.

Read full topic
item.source: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity

item.title: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Thanks a lot for your work @imranhsayed and @smit.soni22

I’m sure this theme will help us spread the word and onboard lots of new developers to Frontity! We are really lucky to have you as contributors since day 1

Read full topic
item.source: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity

item.title: Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme for Frontity
item.dc:creator: imranhsayed
item.description:
I am excited to share the about the new Twenty Nineteen WordPress theme that I and @smit.soni22 developed recently
We used Mars as a starter theme which gave us a kickstart. It made it very simple for us to customize the theme.
We also added pagination.
Here are some quick links for the theme:

Intro/Tutorial Video
Live Demo
npm package:
Git repo

I would like to thank @luisherranz, @Pablo, @SantosGuillamot and the entire Frontity team for their support from the time of development till release

Special thanks to @Reyes for writing a beautiful blog for the theme
